CustomField.description: Auto checked if the "Under Income" reason is selected in the "Application Ineligibility Reason(s)" field. Used for Ineligibility CONGA merge.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto checked if the "Under Income" reason is selected in the "Application Ineligibility Reason(s)" field. Used for Ineligibility CONGA merge.
CustomField.label: IRC_Under Income
